dependsOn.guidance: Briefs that must be built before this one — usually the database models this resource reads or writes.

instructions.when: For each resource (a group of related operations) an API needs. One file per resource. Lives in the API's solution folder; the API itself is defined in that folder's API-spec.json.
instructions.how: Answer in plain English. Then hand it to Claude using the bridge in claude-only/1-translate-to-claude.md, along with the page and any data models it touches.
instructions.note: Solution = the folder this file sits in.

purpose.question: In one line, what is this resource for?
purpose.example: Create, log in, and manage users.

operations.guidance: One entry per operation. "whoCanCall" uses the roles/claims from the Project Brief.

request.question: What does each operation expect in the body?
request.guidance: Show the shape per operation, keyed by operation name. Mark which fields are required.

response.question: What does each operation return?
response.guidance: Describe the shape, and which data model(s) it comes from (the model files in the Database solution).

dataModels.question: Which data models does it read or write?

limits.question: Any limits (rate limits, page size, max payload)?

watchOutFor.question: Anything to watch out for (side effects, things that must not happen twice)?

changesOverTime.guidance: You don't fill this in at the start. Each time you come back to change this resource, add an entry describing what should change. Keep changes small.

exampleEntry.change: Add a DELETE operation, Admin only.
